title: Bandit Pack TTRP
description: This Pack has few items like fun mythical Plushies and mount Monster heads for walls. There are other Items like Plates, bowls, and Cigars! That are now animated!! Hope you enjoy.
body: This Pack has few items like fun mythical Plushies and mount Monster heads for walls. There are other Items like Plates, bowls, and Cigars! That are now animated!! There are Caged animals aswell to make your decor fun or scary! hope you enjoy! :3
